channel.title: manifesto on Nyo's Study Book
channel.description: Recent content in manifesto on Nyo's Study Book

item.title: Manifesto Software Craftsmanship (軟體工藝宣言)
item.description: Manifesto Software Craftsmanship As aspiring Software Craftsmen we are raising the bar of professional software development by practicing it and helping others learn the craft. Through this work we have come to value: Not only working software, but also well-crafted software Not only responding to change, but also steadily adding value Not only individuals and interactions, but also a community of professionals Not only customer collaboration, but also productive partnerships
